_comment: Operator-maintained source for Borough President + District Attorney (METRO_EXPANSION_PLAYBOOK 11.3). Fill each name from the official BP/DA site and set url to that official page, then run scripts/build_borough_officials.py. Leave a name null to omit it (the card then links to the NYC Green Book instead of naming anyone). NEVER guess a name - these are elected offices and a wrong name is a real error.
_verified: 2026-07-13 - each name confirmed on the office's own official site (Queens BP canonical queensbp.nyc.gov; SI DA statenislandda.org); BP set cross-checked against Wikipedia. Re-verify before/after each election cycle.
